description_long: This chair features a whimsical and playful design with a round seat and a high, slatted backrest. The seat and backrest are adorned with alternating red and white stripes, reminiscent of a candy cane or circus theme. The seat itself is circular with a white semicircular accent at the front, bordered by a striped edge. The four legs are angled outward and also display the same red and white striped pattern, giving the chair a cohesive and eye-catching appearance. The materials appear to be painted wood or metal, providing both durability and a smooth, hard surface. This chair would stand out in urban parks, playgrounds, or themed public spaces, offering both functionality and visual appeal.
description: A round, red-and-white striped chair with a high slatted backrest and angled legs, featuring a playful, candy-inspired design. The seat is circular with a white accent and the entire chair is visually striking and sturdy.
description_view_0: Front view shows the circular seat with a white semicircular accent, high slatted backrest, and striped legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the chair's depth, the thickness of the seat, and the outward angle of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full height and width of the slatted backrest and the striped pattern continuity.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again emphasizes the seat's thickness, leg angle, and the backrest's slats.
